overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban industrial district. The player character navigates from an open street intersection past a police vehicle, through covered industrial walkways beneath power pylons and orange piping, and across a busy intersection with passing traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with commercial buildings

events.description: white police SUV with black stripes drives past from left to right across the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the city sidewalk toward an industrial district

notable_agents.action: police SUV driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: low commercial building with red fabric awnings and neon signage
tall black metal electrical transmission tower with multiple cables
modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a sunlit city intersection with a commercial building featuring red awnings. A police SUV drives past as the character begins walking along the sidewalk. The industrial pylon looms in the distance against the clear morning sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial zone with power infrastructure and piping

events.description: moving from open commercial street into industrial area dominated by the power pylon
camera tilts upward to look at the power lines and tower against the bright sky

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the industrial structures and power lines overhead

entered.detail: tall yellow building with NO FUTURE signage in red letters
large orange industrial pipes and metal support structures spanning overhead

segments.scene_description: The character moves into an industrial zone where the massive power pylon dominates the view. The camera pans up to admire the tower and cables against the sun. A distinctive yellow high-rise with 'NO FUTURE' signage appears on the right, while orange industrial piping comes into view overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial walkway beneath pipe gantries and walkways

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway following a small group of pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction through the corridor

entered.detail: rusted metal catwalks and support beams crisscrossing overhead
tall gray concrete wall with red painted trim lines

segments.scene_description: Walking through a semi-enclosed industrial corridor, the character follows a group of NPCs beneath orange pipes and metal gantries. Strong shadows pattern the concrete ground from the overhead structures. The power pylon recedes into the distance as the walkway continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street beneath highway overpasses approaching intersection

events.description: yellow sports car drives past on the street from right to left
traffic light changes from red to green, allowing pedestrian crossing

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk then crossing the street at a traffic signal

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car driving along the street from right to left

entered.detail: elevated concrete highway structure with massive support columns
traffic light pole showing red then changing to green

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens to a sunlit street beneath highway overpasses. A yellow sports car speeds past as the character approaches an intersection. The traffic signal changes from red to green, and the character crosses the street with other pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright city intersection through a shadowed industrial corridor and back into the open urban traffic. It begins on a sunlit sidewalk past a commercial building with red awnings as a police SUV drives by, with a massive power pylon looming in the distance. As the camera moves deeper into the industrial zone, the view pans up toward the tower's cables against the sun before revealing a yellow high-rise with NO FUTURE signage and orange overhead piping. The scene then shifts into a semi-enclosed corridor where the character follows a group of pedestrians beneath metal gantries and patterned shadows, causing the pylon to recede into the distance. Finally, the camera exits the covered walkway into the bright light of a street beneath highway overpasses, passing a speeding yellow sports car before crossing a busy intersection as the traffic signal turns green.
